creator: nopwhere@gmail.com
text:
I have the latest ports installed. Since a few days (a week?), when trying to use vlc, the X server aborts. The last line of the log file says "I830EmitFlush: BEGIN_BATCH called without closing ADVANCE_BATCH".

The same seems to happen on Ubuntu: https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/xserver-xorg-video-intel/+bug/358365

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Use vlc (happened with 0.9.8a, and now also with 0.9.9a) with an Intel graphics card.
